mdSummary:
# DataTable

Table with sorting, pagination, and row selection built in.

**Package:** `Lumeo.DataGrid` · **Category:** Data Display/Tables
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/data-table

| DataTableSortableHeader | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
